message:
🌱 clickhouse: Full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer. (#1104)

* 🌱 Add clickhouse: Full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer. mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix accuracy: MPP/CBO issue was duplicate, PR not merged (clickhouse#56826)

- Changed status from completed to proposed since PR #56827 was
  closed without merging and the issue was labeled as duplicate
- Removed broken pr URL from sourceUrls
- Updated resolution summary to note duplicate status and closed PR
- Added duplicate tag to reflect upstream labeling

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
